items.title: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
items.summary: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.

items.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
items.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

items.title: Magyar calls for fast handover of power in talks with Hungary's president
items.summary: Péter Magyar, the man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, wants the new parliament to convene in early May.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美36歲男子性侵6兒童 法官重判438年不得假釋：讓他關到死為止
items.summary: 美國田納西州發生一起駭人聽聞的兒童性侵案，36歲男子鮑爾（Matthew Cody Ball）因在長達13年間連續虐待、性侵多名幼童，週二遭當地法院重判438年有期徒刑且不得假釋...…

items.title: 民調顯示對中好感回升 但7成美國民眾仍對中國抱持疑慮
items.summary: 根據皮優研究中心14日公布的最新調查，美國民眾對中國的整體觀感雖已連續第三年回升，但多項關鍵指標顯示，兩國之間的深層不信任依然強烈。調查指出，目前僅有27%的美國人對中國持正...…

items.title: 稱伊朗戰爭不影響5月訪中 川普自曝：曾寫信要求習近平勿提供武器
items.summary: 美國總統川普在15日播出的電視訪談中透露，他曾致函中國國家主席習近平，要求對方勿對伊朗提供武器，習近平則回信說，中國不會提供德黑蘭武器。  在這段14日錄製的訪談中，川普並...…
